title: Super Mario Paint - Turrican 2 Intro
description:
April Fool's! The joke is I actually made it. So really, the fool in this scenario would be me.

It's all downhill from here, folks.

Probably my favourite of the multiple masterpieces by Chris Hülsbeck, I've seen several COVERS of this, but those weren't accurate enough for my purposes. So I dug up the TFMX composer and original music files and taught myself how to install an Amiga workbench so as to scrub through the tune track by track. It's some pretty buggy software, but it did the trick.

This was another of those tunes that I naïvely attempted to start back in Mario Paint Composer, before I was even any good at it. And then took a new stab at it in SMP but left off less than halfway through. It feels good to get it off my slate all these years after the fact, even through all the damn key changes, swapping percussion, multiple attempts at iterations of half the bars, and the hours of frustration trying to get it to record without major hiccups. I think 1:09 turned out the best.

I'm not sure what's next at this point. I'm probably tapped out for the rest of the year, at least.
